summary: Daily Citation Research - 3 New Directories Identified

businessInfo.name: Immunity IV LA
businessInfo.description: Mobile Immune Boost IV therapy delivered to your home or hotel in Los Angeles. Licensed clinicians, same-day appointments available.

todaysResearch.name: EZlocal
todaysResearch.action: Free listing available - Sign up with business info, verify via phone
todaysResearch.notes: US-focused directory. No cost. Good for local SEO boost.

todaysResearch.name: iGlobal
todaysResearch.action: Free global directory covering 60 countries. Add business at iglobal.co
todaysResearch.notes: Global reach, free verification process, good backlink value.

todaysResearch.name: Los Angeles Business Journal (LABJ)
todaysResearch.action: Check for free basic listing or paid options
todaysResearch.notes: High-authority LA-specific publication. May require paid subscription for listing.

blockedSites.name: Cylex
blockedSites.workaround: Manual submission at cylex.us.com - free listing available

tier1Status.note: All 5 TIER 1 sites require owner account credentials
tier1Status.nextSteps: Owner needs to create accounts and submit listings. NAP info and descriptions are documented and ready.

recommendedNextActions: 1. Submit to EZlocal (dash.ezlocal.com/newlisting/) - Free, easy signup
2. Submit to iGlobal (iglobal.co) - Free global directory
3. Contact owner about completing TIER 1 sites (Google, Yelp, Bing, Apple, FB)
4. Try manual submission to BBB (bbb.org/get-listed) - Free verification
